title: Turning $20K Into $170K: What Actually Worked
author: Zealousideal-Hat4801
selftext:
My original intention in coming here was simple: to share my experiences and to assist those who share my mindset.

I do not come from a financial background. I was once a supermarket manager, earning just enough to cover daily expenses with virtually no savings. Eventually, I realized that if I wanted to change my circumstances, I had to make a different choice  so I quit my job and immersed myself completely in market research and trading.

Over time, I gradually developed a structured approach to day trading  a method that prioritizes trends, timing, and discipline, rather than blind speculation.

The core of this strategy lies in utilizing moving averages to confirm market trends, combined with "Price Action" analysis to pinpoint precise entry points, thereby capturing high-probability breakout opportunities within established uptrends.

Key Takeaways:

Trend Confirmation: When the 9-day, 20-day, and 50-day moving averages align in a bullish configuration (i.e., shorter-term averages sit above longer-term averages), and the price consistently trades above an ascending trendline, it confirms that the current market is dominated by buyers.

Key Breakout Points (Point 2/4): Pay close attention to the moment the price breaks upward past a previous high or an intraday resistance level; if this breakout is accompanied by a significant surge in trading volume, it signals that the upward momentum is likely to continue.

Ideal Retracement Points (Point 3): The optimal entry opportunity typically arises during the "retracement" phase following a breakout. At this juncture, look for a "confluence point" of technical indicators  specifically, where the price pulls back to the intersection of the trendline and an Exponential Moving Average (such as the 20-day or 50-day EMA) and finds effective support at that level.

Target Setting (Point 5): Set your take-profit target at a specific distance beyond the peak of the previous upward swing, or position it near the next key resistance zone.

For me, trading has never been about chasing "get-rich-quick" schemes or seeking instant profits. Its true essence lies in establishing a repeatable trading process and executing it with unwavering consistency. This trading framework is the culmination of countless rounds of trial and error and refinement on my part; it has enabled me to filter out the various "noises" of the market, allowing me to remain consistently focused on trading opportunities with exceptionally high win rates.

I have compiled my entire trading system  including all specific parameters and configurations  into a concise reference folder, and I would be more than happy to share my insights with anyone, completely free of charge. If you are currently delving into similar trading strategies, or if you have an interest in low-priced stocks and intraday trading setups, I warmly welcome the opportunity to exchange ideas and engage in discussion with you. At the same time, I look forward to gaining new knowledge and inspiration from all of you.

comments.author: cheezweiner
comments.body: Excellent! Please share your bot, your algos and trading strategy in here for all to see. There’s 0 reason to keep it private if you’re wanting to just help people and not profit off them.
